Sent: Fri Sep 28 14:10:47 2007
Subject: approval for Karen and Brice

Brice and Karen have requested Dec 20 to Jan 20….

They said, “These are rough dates, due to the uncertainty of JE’s situation we have delayed submitting this request, but due to escalating flight costs and availability it has become necessary to submit this request. We are returning to NZ for Brice’s closest friends wedding. We have tentative bookings, requiring confirmation within the next 48 hours. Please note, if we had booked these flights in Aug, as we normally would have, out outlay would have been $1,900 as of date is around $3,000 per person.”



Is this approved?
